items.caption: A bustling scene inside a crowded subway car in beijing. the car is filled with people, some of whom are wearing face masks, indicating a concern for health and safety. the subway car is marked with the number "a24" and has a qr code on the window, possibly for contact tracing or information purposes. the text "commuters jamming into a beijing subway car" suggests the image is related to the density of urban life and public transportation in the city.
